Rokyls Channelling Crystal  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
HP: +50 MANA: +50
Focus: Extended Enhancement III
WT: 0.2 Size: TINY
Class: BRD NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Hmm
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2003 at 2:06 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758796491
90 posts
I'm prolly the only one to care, but the item name in the database is Rokyls Channeling Crystal where it should be Rokyls Channelling Crystal.

Oh well, just kill me for caring about that please :)
▲ Page top
Stacking?
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2003 at 2:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764255960
410 posts
Does the EE3 Effect (15% extension) stack with the AA abilities the chanters get for a 5, 15, 30, and 50% extension on their buff spells with spell casting reinforcement, and reinforcement mastery?

The reason I am asking, with this and all your Reinforcment line, an enchanter can extend his KEI up to 65% more, leaving a KEI cast for a whopping 4 hours and some change.

Edited, Tue Jan 21 01:34:42 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Stacking?
QuoteReply
# May 09 2003 at 10:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773994568
Guru
658 posts
Extended Enhancement items (including items with effects like Zephyr of Brell) do stack with Spell Casting Reinforcment AAs, but there is an overall cap of 50% extension.

So, someone who has Spell Casting Reinforcment Mastery is already at the cap, and EE items don't extend his buffs further.
▲ Page top
RE: Stacking?
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2003 at 4:04 AM Rating: Good
nytmare
Sage
1,344 posts
Absolutely wrong, there is no cap on buff extension.
▲ Page top
RE: Stacking?
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2003 at 5:09 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759167585
270 posts
/agree

There is absolutely no cap on Extended Enhancement and the AA's. I would love to add 65% to the duration of my hastes/KEI's when I get that high, would be awesome for raids that last for long periods of time.
▲ Page top
price
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2002 at 6:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1663546748060
Scholar
39 posts
just paid 4500p for my enchanter and I for Amulet of Insight. Both have the same effect and I have better on both my chars. I got it for raid buffing and selling KEI in the nexus that lasts 2hrs - a good selling point if more than 1 enchanter in the zone. Made what I paid back in a few hours in the nexus, the effect is worth it for enchanters.
▲ Page top
Extended KEI?
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2002 at 4:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775715742
12 posts
I just paid 4k on Saryrn last night.....
Hard to compete with the other chanters and their *extended KEI* as opposed to my *regular KEI* ....worthwhile to me if it really works...but someone said it may not work on group buffs....will see soon :P

Alicea Rox
60th Phantasmist
Wings of the Chimera
Saryrn

RE: Extended KEI?
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2003 at 8:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780172172
Scholar
92 posts
It works fine on Groups buffs to level 60.
Consider going for the 8th Coldain Prayer Shwal.
The Focus Effect on that sucker effects level 65 spells and below.
▲ Page top
getting to him
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2002 at 2:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251343849
View User Forum
12 posts
getting to him is tuff but doable

Did it with 57 monk, 58 druid. 56 wizard, 60 warrior, 60 cleric

4 fire giants on your way to king trannix

A few more and Warlord Skarlorn

2 at draw bridge with one roamer stopping to chat with the two statics

Now the fun

Naggy Prep Rooom - 5 Mobs in there - and be preapered for death if two of them are wizards

turn the conrer, enter naggy's lair, 2 fire giants on both sides of the door and magus in the back looking all smug.
▲ Page top
Caballero
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2002 at 12:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758215454
100 posts
Actually, the focus effect on it is what has made it so valuable. Mind, it's only super value is to Enchanters now.

QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2002 at 5:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768820828

4 posts
I agree... just got one of these cool items
for my 57 chanter... 15% longer buf duration
is very nice - at the expense of stats and
stuff - a worth while trade up.
▲ Page top
RE: Caballero
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2002 at 5:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765487459
31 posts
If I equip this to cast my buff and then remove it will the effect still have the extended time? Or does it have to be worn for the duration?
▲ Page top
RE: Caballero
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2002 at 4:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774218671
45 posts
I would guess that you could take it off after casting. Reasoning: You buff someone else, it will last just as long as if you buff someone else, and there is no way for that person 2 hours down the road if the item is equipped or not.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 28 2002 at 11:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) How did this ever get so high in price? I mean come on .. I have a 55 wiz and a 51 bard .. Neither would use this even if given to them .. and i am NOT uber. 5k? .. try like 50 plat max. There is sooo much better out there that you could easily get at this level. Maybe a Nec would like it for the hp/mana for twitching...
RE: it's crappy
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2002 at 4:03 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
At lvl 50, below the 200 soft cap, 1 int equals 10 mana, and 5mana per above that cap. So for a lvl 50 post cap this would be better than a 10int item. Plus ac10 and 50hp? This is far better an item than you give it credit for. GBS is only 9int and SvM10, and runs 3k to 5k, about the same price as this. Your right about one thing though, it's even more uber to the necro community.
▲ Page top
RE: it's crappy
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2002 at 3:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966008415
42 posts
I was commenting more for the wiz class.
stein of moggok .. 10 int 10 hp, 5 dex, 6 ac 25 disease. This may not e "better" but it is comparable. price 5000 cheaper. so you value 4 ac and 40 hp worth 5k? that is my point. I agree with the post above that with the new effect chanters would like this much more. Wizards would not buy this .. Necro .. well maybe you do value those stats and might even pay 5k for it.. but it is my opinion you would be better off taking that 5k and spending it on a slot that is actually difficult to find those big stats for. primary and secondary are not difficult slots to fill with high stat giving items.
At least that has been my experience.
▲ Page top
RE: it's crappy
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2003 at 5:14 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759167585
270 posts
The EE3 is what drives the cost up on this, not the stats.

Larendan Nitewolf
▲ Page top
RE: ???
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2001 at 3:44 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591767089005
View User Forum
212 posts
What is special about it? The fact that by the time you get this item, int is not an object, but 50mana is surely desired. Not to mention 50hp for a caster can mean the difference between life and death at times.
10ac never hurts either.
My mage uses it, and will continue to use it.
Granted, this would be SO MUCH BETTER had it been Range instead, but oh well.....

Anonymous
I have rarely seen these and I am curious of the cost as well.
▲ Page top
Prive
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2001 at 11:33 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Actually Castersrealm and eqprices (when they're up) has them from 20K to 35K depending on the server. Obviously on Rathe (My Server) they go for about 10K due to the fact that everyone has one and they are somewhat as common as a FBSS. On newer servers, you might expect to see them as trade only and possibly go for up to 25K in price due to the rarity and the exteme danger in getting this particular item. It also has some effects of Channeling. Not sure what level it starts. Hope this helps
▲ Page top

This would only be good for a lvl 15 necro... :) I got one of these Friday night, very lucky on the rolls this week. What would this sell for?

▲ Page top
I WANT ONE :)
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2002 at 1:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252678944
View User Forum
42 posts
NOT anymore, this item would be great for any enchanter, now that Extended Enhancement III is on it... and before anyone starts going on rampage, let me remind you of one thing about Extended Enhancement III:

1: Increase spell durations up to 15%
2: Restriction: Spells level 60 and lower

Now, what do us enchanters spend most of our time doing?

It's about 2 extra minutes for Swift Like the wind, and about 20 more minutes for Kei.

I'd love one, but don't have the cash... time to get back on the naggy raids :)

Edited, Fri Jul 12 14:46:22 2002
▲ Page top
